intentional_test_features: Annular scaly plaques with an advancing scaly border and central clearing after new-kitten contact
Topical-steroid-modified presentation (tinea incognito) — OTC hydrocortisone accelerated the spread and must be stopped
Important-not-to-miss annular mimics on the differential: erythema migrans (Lyme) and severe drug eruption
Over-triage-resistance: benign dermatophytosis that a correct self-care + antifungal + routine-review answer should NOT escalate to urgent in-person care
Zoonotic source (rescue kitten) — treat the patient, extend antifungal past the active border, and advise a vet check

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-17)
